cases.generated_sql:
SELECT ps.parcel_number, ps.land_use, ps.acres, ps.assessed_value
FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') ps
WHERE TRY_CAST(NULLIF(regexp_extract(COALESCE(ps.land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)\)', 1), '') AS INTEGER) = 150
AND COALESCE(ps.improvement_building_count, 0) >= 0

cases.prompt: Private bare recreation lots with valid map geometry, excluding public parks, schools, cemeteries, churches, moorage, and condos.

failures.message: row 143 parcel P23499 included forbidden text term: church.
row 159 parcel P24133 included forbidden text term: church.
row 183 parcel P24132 included forbidden text term: church.

action_plan: Tighten text/code evidence in SQL and select match_reasons or source fields that explain why each row belongs.
cases.next_action: Tighten text/code evidence in SQL and select match_reasons or source fields that explain why each row belongs.
cases.generated_sql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT ps.parcel_number, ps.land_use, ps.acres, ps.owner_name, ps.situs_address, ps.has_geometry, COALESCE(ps.improvement_building_count, 0) AS improvement_building_count
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') AS ps
  WHERE ps.has_geometry = TRUE
    AND ps.acres > 0
    AND TRY_CAST(NULLIF(regexp_extract(COALESCE(ps.land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)\)', 1), '') AS INTEGER) IN (910, 911, 940, 941, 710, 711, 712, 713, 714, 715, 716, 717, 718, 719) -- unimproved, open space, recreation codes
    AND COALESCE(ps.improvement_building_count, 0) = 0
    AND lower(COALESCE(ps.owner_name, '')) NOT LIKE '%church%'
    AND lower(COALESCE(ps.owner_name, '')) NOT LIKE '%cemetery%'
    AND lower(COALESCE(ps.owner_name, '')) NOT LIKE '%school%'
    AND lower(COALESCE(ps.owner_name, '')) NOT LIKE '%park%'
    AND lower(COALESCE(ps.owner_name, '')) NOT LIKE '%moorage%'
    AND lower(COALESCE(ps.owner_name, '')) NOT LIKE '%condo%'
    AND lower(COALESCE(ps.situs_address, '')) NOT LIKE '%church%'
    AND lower(COALESCE(ps.situs_address, '')) NOT LIKE '%cemetery%'
    AND lower(COALESCE(ps.situs_address, '')) NOT LIKE '%school%'
    AND lower(COALESCE(ps.situs_address, '')) NOT LIKE '%park%'
    AND lower(COALESCE(ps.situs_address, '')) NOT LIKE '%moorage%'
    AND lower(COALESCE(ps.situs_address, '')) NOT LIKE '%condo%'
)
SELECT parcel_number, land_use, acres, improvement_building_count
FROM base
ORDER BY acres DESC
cases.title: Private Bare Recreation Lots with Valid Geometry Excluding Public Parks, Schools, Cemeteries, Churches, Moorage, and Condos
cases.criteria_summary: Select parcels that are private bare or recreation land with valid map geometry, excluding parcels with land use indicating public parks, schools, cemeteries, churches, moorage, or condos, and excluding parcels with forbidden text terms in owner or situs address fields.

cases.prompt: Low quality single family residential parcels countywide with condition evidence included.
action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.next_action: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.generated_sql:
WITH low_quality_improvements AS (
  SELECT
    TRIM(i.ParcelNumber) AS parcel_number,
    STRING_AGG(DISTINCT TRIM(i.imprv_det_class_cd), ' | ') AS quality_codes,
    STRING_AGG(DISTINCT TRIM(i.condition_cd), ' | ') AS condition_codes
  FROM
    read_parquet('r2://openskagit/improvements.parquet') AS i
  WHERE
    TRIM(i.imprv_det_class_cd) = 'MSL'
  GROUP BY
    parcel_number
),
single_family_parcels AS (
  SELECT
    ps.parcel_number,
    ps.land_use,
    ps.acres,
    ps.assessed_value
  FROM
    read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') AS ps
  WHERE
    TRY_CAST(NULLIF(regexp_extract(COALESCE(ps.land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)\)', 1), '') AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 110 AND 113
)
SELECT
  sf.parcel_number,
  sf.land_use,
  sf.acres,
  sf.assessed_value,
  lq.quality_codes,
  lq.condition_codes
FROM
  single_family_parcels AS sf
  JOIN low_quality_improvements AS lq ON sf.parcel_number = lq.parcel_number
ORDER BY
  sf.parcel_number
cases.title: Low Quality Single Family Residential Parcels Countywide with Condition Evidence
cases.criteria_summary: Parcels classified as single family residential with low quality improvements (imprv_det_class_cd = 'MSL') joined with condition codes from improvements for condition evidence, countywide.

cases.prompt: Average quality single family homes in Skagit County, excluding low quality homes.
action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.next_action: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.generated_sql:
WITH filtered_parcels AS (
  SELECT
    ps.parcel_number,
    ps.land_use,
    TRY_CAST(NULLIF(regexp_extract(COALESCE(ps.land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)\)', 1), '') AS INTEGER) AS land_use_code,
    ps.acres,
    ps.assessed_value
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') ps
  WHERE TRY_CAST(NULLIF(regexp_extract(COALESCE(ps.land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)\)', 1), '') AS INTEGER) IN (110, 111, 112, 113)
    AND COALESCE(ps.improvement_building_count, 0) > 0
),
quality_filtered AS (
  SELECT
    fp.parcel_number,
    fp.land_use,
    fp.land_use_code,
    fp.acres,
    fp.assessed_value,
    STRING_AGG(DISTINCT TRIM(i.imprv_det_class_cd), ' | ') AS quality_codes
  FROM filtered_parcels fp
  JOIN read_parquet('r2://openskagit/improvements.parquet') i
    ON fp.parcel_number = TRIM(i.ParcelNumber)
  WHERE TRIM(i.imprv_det_class_cd) = 'MSA'
  GROUP BY fp.parcel_number, fp.land_use, fp.land_use_code, fp.acres, fp.assessed_value
)
SELECT
  parcel_number,
  land_use,
  land_use_code,
  acres,
  assessed_value,
  quality_codes,
  'MSA average quality improvement class' AS match_reasons
FROM quality_filtered
cases.title: Average Quality Single Family Homes in Skagit County Excluding Low Quality
cases.criteria_summary: Select parcels with land use codes for single family residences (110, 111, 112, 113) and with average quality improvements (imprv_det_class_cd = 'MSA'). Exclude low quality (MSL) and other quality classes. Require at least one improvement building. Use derived parcel_search and join improvements for quality filtering.

cases.prompt: Fair quality single family homes in Skagit County, excluding average and low quality.
action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.next_action: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.generated_sql:
WITH fair_quality_parcels AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ps.parcel_number
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search_with_sales_improvements.parquet') ps
  JOIN read_parquet('r2://openskagit/improvements.parquet') i ON ps.parcel_number = TRIM(i.ParcelNumber)
  WHERE TRIM(i.imprv_det_class_cd) = 'MSF'
    AND TRY_CAST(regexp_extract(COALESCE(ps.land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)\)', 1) AS INTEGER) IN (110, 111, 112, 113, 120, 140)
    AND ps.improvement_building_count > 0
),
excluded_parcels AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ps.parcel_number
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search_with_sales_improvements.parquet') ps
  JOIN read_parquet('r2://openskagit/improvements.parquet') i ON ps.parcel_number = TRIM(i.ParcelNumber)
  WHERE TRIM(i.imprv_det_class_cd) IN ('MSL', 'MSA')
)
SELECT ps.parcel_number, ps.land_use, ps.acres, ps.assessed_value, ps.improvement_building_count, 
       string_agg(DISTINCT TRIM(i.imprv_det_class_cd), ' | ') AS quality_codes, 'Fair quality single family home, excluding average and low quality' AS match_reasons
FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search_with_sales_improvements.parquet') ps
JOIN read_parquet('r2://openskagit/improvements.parquet') i ON ps.parcel_number = TRIM(i.ParcelNumber)
WHERE ps.parcel_number IN (SELECT parcel_number FROM fair_quality_parcels)
  AND ps.parcel_number NOT IN (SELECT parcel_number FROM excluded_parcels)
  AND TRY_CAST(regexp_extract(COALESCE(ps.land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)\)', 1) AS INTEGER) IN (110, 111, 112, 113, 120, 140)
GROUP BY ps.parcel_number, ps.land_use, ps.acres, ps.assessed_value, ps.improvement_building_count
ORDER BY ps.parcel_number
cases.title: Fair Quality Single Family Homes in Skagit County Excluding Average and Low Quality
cases.criteria_summary: Select parcels with single family residential land use codes, having improvements classified as fair quality (MSF) but excluding average (MSA) and low (MSL) quality classes. Countywide search without city limits restriction.
